# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyThreetierAppVPC
  
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    
  VPCDHCPOptions:
    Type: AWS::EC2::DHCPOptions
    Properties:
      DomainName: example.com
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-DHCP-Options
  
  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
  
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
  
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2c
      
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2d
  
Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: "The ID of the newly created VPC"
    Value: !Ref MyVPC
  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: "The ID of the newly created Internet Gateway"
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
